properties.summary: A suspect is in custody following a shooting incident at last night’s White House correspondents’ dinner.  Donald Trump and and wife Melania Trump were rushed out of the event at the Washington Hilton. The suspect was identified as Cole Tomas Allen.
Example rally event used for testing visualization.

properties.event_title: Austin-Texas: Mass shooting at Buford's on West 6th Street
properties.summary: AUSTIN, Texas — Four people are dead and 13 others are injured following a mass shooting at Buford's on West 6th Street early Sunday, officials said. The suspect was fatally shot by police officers at the scene.
properties.raw_text: AUSTIN, Texas — Four people are dead and 13 others are injured following a mass shooting at Buford's on West 6th Street early Sunday, officials said. The suspect was fatally shot by police officers at the scene.
